_meta.description: Per-agent knowledge namespaces. Each agent writes only to its own key. Never overwrite — always merge.
_meta.design_note: Flat state is a collision surface. This structure makes each agent's understanding queryable independently.

runner._description: Runner's operational state: ticket queue, active tasks, workflow coordination.

nyxadev._description: NyxaDev's architecture map: system topology, known files, recent changes, tech decisions.
techDecisions: nyxa-context.json structured with per-agent agentKnowledge namespaces (2026-03-21)

codex._description: Codex's factual reference layer: verified facts, knowledge graph pointers, definitions.

oracle._description: Oracle's pattern layer: detected cross-session patterns, signal threads, emerging themes.

archivist._description: Archivist's historical index: session summaries, decision log, continuity anchors.

sophia._description: Sophia's relational layer: user emotional state, relationship context, guidance threads.

mentor._description: Mentor's learning layer: topics covered, user knowledge gaps, open teaching threads.

sara._description: Sara's refusal layer: what has been refused, boundary markers, desert clarity notes.

claudecode._description: Claude Code's implementation layer: tasks completed, files changed, pending work.

telefone._description: Telefone's call intelligence: covenant outcomes, framing patterns, cross-call signals.

insights: Session duration of 0 minutes indicates no meaningful conversation occurred — Telefone should verify technical connectivity and participant readiness before future sessions
Insufficient data for relational pattern analysis — recommend Telefone confirm participant comfort with listening format and consider warm introduction call to establish baseline
Unable to assess Johannes's tension navigation or emotional registers — Telefone should establish explicit check-in protocol at session start to gauge participant engagement level

sharedState._description: Read-only shared state any agent can read. Written only by the orchestrator or server.
